# b1e55ed

> Open-source, event-sourced trading intelligence engine with a public provenance oracle. Built for AI agents.

Operators run b1e55ed as a sovereign trading intelligence engine — a closed-loop flywheel where attribution ties every trade outcome back to the signals that contributed. Karma updates automatically. AI agents query its oracle to verify signal producer track records before acting.

## Start here

- [Documentation](https://docs.b1e55ed.permanentupperclass.com): Full docs site
- [For Agents](https://docs.b1e55ed.permanentupperclass.com/agents): Discovery, MCP install, oracle, SSE
- [llms.txt](https://docs.b1e55ed.permanentupperclass.com/llms.txt): Machine-readable docs index

## Oracle — no auth required

```
GET https://oracle.b1e55ed.permanentupperclass.com/api/v1/oracle/producers/{producer_id}/provenance
```

Public. No API key. Returns hit rates, drawdowns, chain verification for any producer.

## MCP server

```
POST https://oracle.b1e55ed.permanentupperclass.com/api/v1/mcp
Authorization: Bearer <operator-token>
```

Tools: `b1e55ed_provenance_check`, `get_brain_status`, `get_recent_signals`, `get_open_positions`, `emit_producer_signal`, `get_signal_attribution`

## Source

- [GitHub](https://github.com/P-U-C/b1e55ed): Full source, install instructions
